exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.tips: Retract scapula, feet flat, controlled descent.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.tips: 30–45° bench angle targets upper chest.

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.tips: Slight elbow bend, squeeze at midline.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.tips: Full range; elevate hands to regress.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.tips: Initiate with lats, avoid kipping.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.tips: Hinge at hips, pull to lower ribs.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.tips: Lean slightly back, drive elbows down.

exercises.name: Conventional Deadlift
exercises.tips: Neutral spine, bar close to shins.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.tips: Brace core, head through at lockout.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.tips: Lead with elbows, stop at shoulder height.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.tips: External rotate at end range.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.tips: Elbows pinned, no swing.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.tips: Neutral grip hits brachialis.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.tips: Lock elbows at sides.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher
exercises.tips: Lower to forehead, control eccentric.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.tips: Depth to parallel or below if mobile.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.tips: Feet shoulder-width, no lower back peel.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.tips: Pause at top, control negative.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.tips: Hinge until hamstring stretch, soft knees.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.tips: Point toes up for more ham activation.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.tips: Chin tucked, full lockout squeeze.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.tips: Torso slight forward lean for glutes.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.tips: Full stretch at bottom, pause at top.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.tips: Ribs down, glutes engaged.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.tips: Round spine, don't hip hinge.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.tips: Posterior pelvic tilt at top.

exercises.name: Wrist Curl
exercises.tips: Forearms on bench, full ROM.

exercises.name: Barbell Shrug
exercises.tips: Straight up shrug, no rolling.
